prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次依次为约113名、128名、98名、325名、153名，波动较大，2024年出现明显后移（325名），2025年回弹至153名；近5年位次均值约163名，标准差约86名，整体呈高位震荡格局，2025年基准位次约153名；该校在内蒙古理科/物理类招生计划2021–2025年均为2人，2026年计划增至5人，扩招150%，为近6年最大幅度扩招；扩招通常意味着竞争相对缓解，位次数字可能增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名中，复旦大学（含医学院）2026年位列第5名，属全国顶尖层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风与学校管理类舆情；但抖音综合热度排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量极大，整体报考关注度仍处高位；历史投档异常方面，2022年河南理科投档线暴跌曾引发中关注，但近年未见明显断档信号；临床医学学科评估A，公共卫生与预防医学A+，护理学A-，基础医学A，药学A；医学学科群实力位居全国前列，与招生专业（临床医学、护理学）高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2024年专业热度指数70.19（推荐），2025年高热推荐，为持续热门方向；护理学热度指数68.61（推荐），人才需求稳定；内蒙古2026年普通高考考生总数约15.4万人，较2025年（约11.6万）增长约33%，按近年物理类占比约72%估算，2026年物理类考生约11.1万人，较2025年（8.4万）增长约32%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海市，属一线城市，对跨省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生占比极小（2025年约2.4%），属外省招生，无本地倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次153名、2026年扩招150%（计划从2人增至5人）的缓解效应、本省物理类考生增长约32%的加剧效应、学校顶尖层次与临床医学高热专业吸引力的对冲作用，以及声誉偏负面但抖音高热关注度的复杂信号，判断2026年最低位次较2025年有所后移（数字增大），但扩招幅度远大于考生增幅，位次后移幅度有限；预测最低位次约271名，区间238–304名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制临床医师班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 暂无（该校在内蒙古仅设2个招生专业，无中等难度专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 护理学（含护理学卓越班、智慧康复方向、健康管理方向、护理学-人工智能双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（238–304名）内，建议以临床医学（八年制）为一档冲刺目标；若位次接近区间下限（238名以内），可重点冲击临床医学；若位次接近区间上限（304名附近），护理学录取概率较高，可作为稳妥选择。该校2026年大幅扩招，整体录取机会较往年有所增加。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 113, 128, 98, 325, and 153, showing significant fluctuations, with a notable drop in 2024 (325) and a rebound to 153 in 2025; the average ranking over the past 5 years is about 163, with a standard deviation of about 86, indicating a high-level volatile pattern, with a baseline ranking of about 153 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia's science/physics category was 2 students from 2021 to 2025, and it will increase to 5 students in 2026, a 150% expansion, the largest in the past 6 years; expansion usually means relatively eased competition, and the ranking number may increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, Fudan University (including the medical college) ranked 5th in 2026, belonging to the top tier nationally, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management public opinion; however, it ranks 4th in Douyin comprehensive popularity (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, so overall application attention remains high; regarding historical admission anomalies, the 2022 Henan science admission score drop attracted moderate attention, but no significant gaps have been seen in recent years; clinical medicine is rated A, public health and preventive medicine A+, nursing A-, basic medicine A, pharmacy A; the medical discipline group ranks among the top nationally, highly matching the enrollment majors (clinical medicine, nursing).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine had a popularity index of 70.19 (recommended) in 2024, and is highly recommended in 2025, remaining a consistently popular direction; nursing has a popularity index of 68.61 (recommended), with stable talent demand; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 154,000, an increase of about 33% from 2025 (about 116,000); estimating based on the recent physics category proportion of about 72%, the number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 111,000, an increase of about 32% from 2025 (84,000), intensifying overall competition; Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal for cross-province candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is very small (about 2.4% in 2025), belonging to out-of-province enrollment with no local bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 153, the easing effect of a 150% enrollment expansion in 2026 (plan from 2 to 5 students), the intensifying effect of a 32% increase in local physics category candidates, the offsetting effect of the university's top tier and clinical medicine's high popularity, and the complex signals of a somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin popularity, it is judged that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift backward (number increases) compared to 2025, but the expansion is much larger than the candidate increase, so the backward shift is limited; the predicted minimum ranking is about 271, with a range of 238–304.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Clinical Physician Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- None (this university only offers 2 enrollment majors in Inner Mongolia, with no medium-difficulty major).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Nursing (including Nursing Excellence Class, Smart Rehabilitation Direction, Health Management Direction, Nursing-Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (238–304), it is recommended to aim for Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year) as a Tier 1 target; if your ranking is near the lower end of the range (within 238), you can focus on Clinical Medicine; if your ranking is near the upper end (around 304), the admission probability for Nursing is higher, making it a safe choice. The university's significant enrollment expansion in 2026 increases overall admission opportunities compared to previous years.
